hero.title: Turn Spotify into a music timer
hero.subtitle: Create live mini-mixes or timed playlists for showers, workouts, breaks, cooking, focus sessions and more.

source.label: Source
source.connectForLikedSongs: Connect Spotify to use Liked Songs

timerMix.title: Live Timer Mix
timerMix.description: Choose a duration, pick how many songs you want, and {appName} plays a live Spotify mini-mix that stops when your timer ends.
timerMix.helper: Works with Spotify Search, Liked Songs and your playlists.
timerMix.requiresPremium: Timer Mix requires Spotify Premium because Spotify only allows browser playback for Premium accounts.
timerMix.limitation: Timer Mix plays live in this browser. It does not create an exportable audio file or permanent mashup.
timerMix.authRequired: Connect Spotify to use Timer Mix.

playlistTimer.title: Playlist Timer
playlistTimer.description: Create a Spotify playlist made of full songs that adds up as closely as possible to your target duration.
playlistTimer.helper: Best when you want to save or export the result to Spotify.

preview.title: Playlist preview
preview.empty: Your generated track list will appear here.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.previewFailed: Unable to generate a preview. Please try again.
errors.exportFailed: Unable to export to Spotify. Please try again.
errors.missingPreview: Preview is missing. Generate a preview before exporting.
errors.spotifyAuthRequired: Connect Spotify to use this mode.
errors.premiumRequired: Timer Mix needs Spotify Premium to play music in this browser. You can still use Playlist Timer.
errors.noTracksFound: No playable tracks found. Try another artist, playlist or source.
errors.noTracksFoundForFilter: No tracks matched this artist filter. Try removing the filter or choosing another source.
errors.notEnoughTracks: Not enough tracks found for this mix. Try fewer songs or a broader source.
errors.sdkDeviceNotReady: Spotify player is still connecting. Try again in a moment.
errors.playlistItemsForbidden: Spotify refused access to that playlist's items. Check playlist permissions and try again.
errors.likedSongsLoadFailed: Unable to load your Liked Songs from Spotify.
errors.playlistsLoadFailed: Unable to load your Spotify playlists.
errors.invalidSelectionMode: Selection mode must be Recent first or Random.
errors.spotifyAddItemsForbidden: Spotify created the playlist but refused adding items. The empty playlist was removed if possible. Please check Spotify app permissions and try again.

codes.SPOTIFY_ADD_TRACKS_FORBIDDEN: Spotify created the playlist but refused adding items. The empty playlist was removed if possible. Please check Spotify app permissions and try again.
codes.SPOTIFY_AUTH_REQUIRED: Connect Spotify to use this mode.
codes.PREMIUM_REQUIRED: Timer Mix needs Spotify Premium to play music in this browser. You can still use Playlist Timer.
codes.account_error: Timer Mix needs Spotify Premium to play music in this browser. You can still use Playlist Timer.
codes.SPOTIFY_AUTH_ERROR: Spotify authorization failed. Please try again.
codes.SPOTIFY_SCOPE_ERROR: Spotify did not grant the required playlist permissions. Clear cookies and authorize again.
codes.PREVIEW_NOT_FOUND: This preview expired or could not be found.
codes.NO_EXPORTABLE_TRACKS: This preview has no Spotify tracks to export.
codes.NO_TRACKS_FOUND: No playable tracks found. Try another artist, playlist or source.
codes.NO_TRACKS_FOUND_FOR_FILTER: No tracks matched this artist filter. Try removing the filter or choosing another source.
codes.PLAYLISTS_LOAD_FAILED: Unable to load your Spotify playlists.
codes.PLAYLIST_NOT_FOUND: That playlist could not be found.
codes.PLAYLIST_ITEMS_FORBIDDEN: Spotify refused access to that playlist's items. Check playlist permissions and try again.
codes.LIKED_SONGS_LOAD_FAILED: Unable to load your Liked Songs from Spotify.
codes.INVALID_SELECTION_MODE: Selection mode must be Recent first or Random.
codes.NOT_ENOUGH_TRACKS: Not enough tracks found for this mix. Try fewer songs or a broader source.
codes.SHORT_TRACK_WARNING: Some selected tracks are shorter than their time block and may end early.
codes.DURATION_REQUIRED: Duration must be between 1 and 30 minutes.
codes.INVALID_FADE_SECONDS: Fade must be between 0 and 15 seconds.
codes.SPOTIFY_SDK_CONNECT_FAILED: The Spotify player could not connect.
codes.SPOTIFY_SDK_LOAD_FAILED: The Spotify player could not load.
codes.SPOTIFY_SDK_NOT_READY: Spotify player is still connecting. Try again in a moment.
codes.SDK_DEVICE_NOT_READY: Spotify player is still connecting. Try again in a moment.
codes.TIMER_MIX_PLAY_FAILED: Spotify refused to start playback on this device.

seo.title: Turn Spotify into a music timer
seo.description: Create live Spotify mini-mixes and timed playlists for showers, workouts, breaks, cooking and focus sessions.

meta.title: {appName} — Turn Spotify into a music timer
meta.description: Create live Spotify mini-mixes and timed playlists for showers, workouts, breaks, cooking and focus sessions. Pick a duration, choose your songs and start your timer.

og.title: {appName} — Live Spotify mini-mixes by duration
og.description: Turn Spotify into a timer. Create live mini-mixes or timed playlists from an artist, your Liked Songs or your playlists.

twitter.title: {appName} — Turn Spotify into a music timer
twitter.description: Create live Spotify mini-mixes and timed playlists by duration.
